title: Methods and apparatus for beam management in mobile communications
abstract: Various solutions for beam management with respect to user equipment and network node in mobile communications are described. An apparatus may receive at least one reference signal from a network node. The apparatus may transmit a beam report to the network node. The beam report may indicate at least one beam which has been synchronized by the apparatus.
